mutations.reason: The workflow's documented query named columns removed from the current AgentDB schema and failed before analysis began.
mutations.evidence: AgentDB rejected content, reinforced, and created_at; learnings currently exposes insight, hit_count, load_count, and ts.

mutations.reason: Resolve the contradiction between a Claude-only slash-syntax learning and verified loader-specific invocation syntax.
mutations.evidence: Claude Code invokes /kernel:<skill>; Codex 0.144.1 invokes $kernel:<skill>. README, QUICKSTART, MIGRATION-8, help, and release-doc tests all encode the loader split.

mutations.reason: Promote cross-loader payload, disposable upgrade, documentation command, and resource-bound verification into reusable test methodology.
mutations.evidence: Claude-shaped parsers silently inspected empty Codex apply_patch fields; source-checkout tests missed installed-cache upgrade behavior; unbounded suite execution crashed the host.

mutations.reason: Make path normalization before allowlist evaluation a standing security rule.
mutations.evidence: Two adversary findings demonstrated that an allowlisted raw prefix accepted .claude/rules/../generated/x.md.

mutations.reason: Make multi-loader schema validation, installed-copy upgrade checks, resource ceilings, and validator-conflict handling part of release gates.
mutations.evidence: The 8.0 audit found pinned 7.23 helper links, loader-specific hook payloads, and a native Codex manifest validator conflict.

mutations.reason: Prevent the retrospective schema query and promoted release methodology from silently drifting again.
mutations.evidence: The stale retrospective query survived until literal execution; regression checks now pin current columns and promoted safety gates.

mutations.reason: Merge two duplicate traversal findings into the stronger containment rule.
mutations.evidence: Both findings share the same cause: raw-prefix allowlisting before lexical traversal rejection.

mutations.reason: Record the reusable distinction between shared hook matchers and loader-specific payload behavior.
mutations.evidence: Codex invoked the hook but the Claude-only parser inspected empty data.

mutations.reason: Record installed-copy testing as the release proof for install, upgrade, rollback, and documentation commands.
mutations.evidence: The 7.23 to 8.0 helper-link migration and marketplace-only recovery were invisible from the source checkout alone.

mutations.reason: Preserve the safety-first decision when loader schemas cannot both validate.
mutations.evidence: The native Codex validator rejected required Claude safety metadata; the proven compatibility loader remained available.

mutations.reason: Treat host exhaustion as a verification-system failure rather than a tolerable test cost.
mutations.evidence: Repeated unbounded test-suite attempts crashed the workstation before this release audit.

missing: Native Codex manifest remains intentionally deferred until the official validator accepts the required safety metadata.
Codex has no equivalent SessionEnd plugin event; durable end-of-session parity needs an upstream capability or a separately proven lifecycle design.
